description_long: This chest of drawers is a robust, rectangular piece of furniture constructed from dark wood, featuring a blocky, utilitarian design. The front face displays three spacious drawers, each equipped with a simple, straight bar pull handle for easy access. The corners are reinforced with darker wooden brackets, giving the piece a sturdy, almost industrial appearance. The sides and top are plain, with a consistent wood grain texture and no additional ornamentation. The back is solid and unadorned, matching the overall dark wood finish. This object would be well-suited for use in urban environments such as apartment entryways, garages, or communal spaces where durability and storage are priorities.
description: A dark wooden chest of drawers with three bar-handled drawers and reinforced corners, featuring a simple, sturdy design.
description_view_0: Side view showing a plain, dark wood panel with visible corner reinforcements and no drawers.
description_view_1: Front view displaying three drawers with bar pull handles and reinforced corners, highlighting the main functional side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, showing a plain, dark wood panel with corner reinforcements.
description_view_3: Back view with a solid, unadorned wood panel and reinforced corners, no drawers or handles visible.
